titleStmt.title: SII 19.406: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 406. (A.R. No. 244 of 1926.) KĪḺAPPAḺUVŪR, UDAIYARPALAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE maṇḍapa IN FRONT OF THE SHRINE, VAṬAMŪLĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records an endowment of land after bringing it under cultivation at Vēṭṭamguḍi a dēvadāna village, for the provision of offerings of rice, vegetables and ghee on the day of Uttarāyaṇa-sankrānti to god Tiruvālandurai-Mahādēva in the temple, and of parched rice, coconut and sugar to Gaṇapati on the day of Tiruvōṇam in Paṅguṉi month, by Māṟapirāṉ Nambi the s11rīkāryam (of the king ?).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koppara
kecaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu pa
tin nāṟāvatu Ittiruvāla
matuṟai mādevaṟkku Utti
raayaṉa saṅkirān=tipotu
tiruvamutukku Arici kuttal
Ayṅkuṟuṇiyum neyyamutu
nāḻiyum tayiramutu kuṟuṇiyu
m kaṟiyamutum gaṇapatiyār
kku paṅkuṉit tiruvoṇatti
ṉāṉṟu Avalamutu tū
ṇiyum teṅkāy pattum
caṟkkarai patiṉpalamum
Ittaṉaikkumāka devatāṉam
veṭṭamkkuṭi vaṉṉiccey mayak
ki cantirātitavaṟ ceyvittāṉ
śrī kāriyam Ārāñca māṟapirā ṉa
mpiyeṉ Itu panmāheśvara
rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 19.406 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
